# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  vmCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 10
    metadata:
      description: Number of VMs to deploy
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_D2s_v3
    metadata:
      description: Size of the virtual machines
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Admin username for the VMs
  authenticationType:
    type: string
    defaultValue: sshPublicKey
    allowedValues:
      - sshPublicKey
      - password
    metadata:
      description: Type of authentication to use on the Virtual Machine
  adminPasswordOrKey:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: SSH Key or password for the Virtual Machine
  osType:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Linux
    allowedValues:
      - Linux
      - Windows
    metadata:
      description: Operating system type
  allowedSourceIPs:
    type: array
    metadata:
      description: Array of allowed source IP addresses/ranges for SSH/RDP access
  enableJitAccess:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable Just-In-Time VM access for enhanced security
  sshPort:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 22
    minValue: 1024
    maxValue: 65535
    metadata:
      description: Custom SSH port (non-standard for security)
  rdpPort:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 3389
    minValue: 1024
    maxValue: 65535
    metadata:
      description: Custom RDP port
  enableDDoSProtection:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable DDoS protection for public IPs
  enableBootDiagnostics:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable boot diagnostics
  enableEncryption:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable disk encryption
  tagEnvironment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Development
    metadata:
      description: Environment tag
variables:
  vnetName: "[concat('vnet-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  subnetName: subnet-vms
  nsgName: "[concat('nsg-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  publicIPPrefix: "[concat('pip-vm-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  nicPrefix: "[concat('nic-vm-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  vmPrefix: "[concat('vm-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  storageAccountName: "[concat('diag', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  linuxConfiguration:
    disablePasswordAuthentication: true
    ssh:
      publicKeys:
        - path: "[concat('/home/', parameters('adminUsername'), '/.ssh/authorized_keys')]"
          keyData: "[parameters('adminPasswordOrKey')]"
  windowsConfiguration:
    enableAutomaticUpdates: true
    provisionVMAgent: true
  imageReference:
    Linux:
      publisher: Canonical
      offer: 0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy
      sku: 22_04-lts-gen2
      version: latest
    Windows:
      publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
      offer: WindowsServer
      sku: 2022-datacenter-azure-edition
      version: latest
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2021-09-01
    name: "[variables('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    condition: "[parameters('enableBootDiagnostics')]"
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      encryption:
        services:
          blob:
            enabled: true
          file:
            enabled: true
        keySource: Microsoft.Storage
    tags:
      Environment: "[parameters('tagEnvironment')]"
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: "[variables('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), 'Allow-SSH', 'Allow-RDP')]"
          properties:
            priority: 1000
            protocol: Tcp
            access: Allow
            direction: Inbound
            sourceAddressPrefixes: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPs')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), string(parameters('sshPort')), string(parameters('rdpPort')))]"
            description: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), 'Allow SSH from authorized IPs only', 'Allow RDP from authorized IPs only')]"
        - name: Deny-All-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            protocol: "*"
            access: Deny
            direction: Inbound
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic
    tags:
      Environment: "[parameters('tagEnvironment')]"
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: "[variables('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - 10.0.0.0/16
      subnets:
        - name: "[variables('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: 10.0.1.0/24
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
    tags:
      Environment: "[parameters('tagEnvironment')]"
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: "[concat(variables('publicIPPrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "[if(parameters('enableDDoSProtection'), 'Standard', 'Basic')]"
      tier: Regional
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Static
      publicIPAddressVersion: IPv4
      idleTimeoutInMinutes: 4
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: "[concat(variables('vmPrefix'), '-', copyIndex(), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
      ddosSettings:
        protectionMode: "[if(parameters('enableDDoSProtection'), 'Enabled', 'Disabled')]"
    copy:
      name: publicIPCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
    tags:
      Environment: "[parameters('tagEnvironment')]"
      SecurityNote: Public IP - Ensure JIT access is enabled
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: "[concat(variables('nicPrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]"
      - publicIPCopy
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('publicIPPrefix'), '-', copyIndex()))]"
      enableAcceleratedNetworking: true
      enableIPForwarding: false
      networkSecurityGroup:
        id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    copy:
      name: nicCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
    tags:
      Environment: "[parameters('tagEnvironment')]"
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01
    name: "[concat(variables('vmPrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - nicCopy
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[concat(variables('vmPrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[if(equals(parameters('authenticationType'), 'password'), parameters('adminPasswordOrKey'), null())]"
        linuxConfiguration: "[if(and(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), equals(parameters('authenticationType'), 'sshPublicKey')), variables('linuxConfiguration'), null())]"
        windowsConfiguration: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), variables('windowsConfiguration'), null())]"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference: "[variables('imageReference')[parameters('osType')]]"
        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(variables('vmPrefix'), '-', copyIndex(), '-osdisk')]"
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
          diskSizeGB: 128
          encryptionSettings:
            enabled: "[parameters('enableEncryption')]"
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(variables('nicPrefix'), '-', copyIndex()))]"
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: "[parameters('enableBootDiagnostics')]"
          storageUri: "[if(parameters('enableBootDiagnostics'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.blob, null())]"
      securityProfile:
        encryptionAtHost: "[parameters('enableEncryption')]"
    copy:
      name: vmCopy
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
    tags:
      Environment: "[parameters('tagEnvironment')]"
      SecurityCompliance: JIT-Access-Required
      BackupPolicy: Daily
outputs:
  vmPublicIPs:
    type: array
    copy:
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      input:
        vmName: "[concat(variables('vmPrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]"
        publicIP: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('publicIPPrefix'), '-', copyIndex()))).ipAddress]"
        fqdn: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(variables('publicIPPrefix'), '-', copyIndex()))).dnsSettings.fqdn]"
        port: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), parameters('sshPort'), parameters('rdpPort'))]"
        protocol: "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), 'SSH', 'RDP')]"
  securityRecommendations:
    type: object
    value:
      jitAccess: Enable Just-In-Time VM access in Azure Security Center
      monitoring: Configure Azure Monitor and Log Analytics for security monitoring
      updates: Enable automatic security updates
      mfa: Enforce MFA for all administrative access
      ipWhitelisting: Regularly review and update allowed source IP addresses
      encryption: Disk encryption is enabled - manage keys securely
      backups: Configure Azure Backup for disaster recovery
